title: Need some help - 5 min survey about your experience developing for monday

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey y’all, my name is Dipro and I’m a Developer Advocate here at monday. I think I’ve spoken to many of you already – either over support tickets, through my webinars, or right here in the community

This month I’m surveying our developer community to understand what y’all think of the monday apps framework and development platform.

The survey is here – the required questions will only take about 5 minutes or so. I’d love it if you could fill it out!
﻿
We’ll be using this feedback to inform our product roadmap and prioritize areas of improvement.

Thank you!
